headline: McNICHOLS CO. Announces Appointment of Mateus Panosso as President
summary: McNICHOLS CO., the largest value-added distributor and fabricator of specialty metals and fiberglass products in North America, announces Mateus Panosso's appointment as President. McNICHOLS and One Equity Partners (OEP), who made a significant investment in the Company in October 2025, view this decision as an important step forward in their partnership.

content.title: McNICHOLS CO. Announces Appointment of Mateus Panosso as President
content.summary: McNICHOLS CO., the largest value-added distributor and fabricator of specialty metals and fiberglass products in North America, announces Mateus Panosso's appointment as President. McNICHOLS and One Equity Partners (OEP), who made a significant investment in the Company in October 2025, view this decision as an important step forward in their partnership.

thumbnail.caption: McNICHOLS CO. introduces a new brand mark and reinforced brand identity. The M Mark revitalizes the Company's very first logo, initially designed by founder Bob McNichols. The logo highlights the Company's first and one of its core product lines of Perforated Metal through the 11 perfect circles (perforations) making up one side of the "M". It's paired with solid blocks and sharp angles that portray abstractly several other product lines McNICHOLS has grown to offer since 1952. (PRNewsfoto/McNichols Company)

headline: Momentum ETFs Are Actually Holding Up
summary: The iShares USA Momentum Factor ETF is up 0.3%, while the while the Invesco Momentum ETF was moving in and out of positive territory.  Momentum ETFs like the iShares fund have actually added energy stocks, which were rising in the wake of the latest wave of re-escalation in the Iran war.  Chip stocks, many of which were actually up on the day, are also major players in momentum ETFs.
